name: append
description: Append one value to a list (1D) or append to each row / append a row in 2D based on axis.

values.description: Current list state. Use [1,2,3] for 1D or [[1,2],[3,4]] for 2D.

value.description: Value to append (number) or row list for axis=0 in 2D.

axis.description: Optional for 2D append: axis=0 append row, axis=1 append value to each row.

name: remove
description: Remove from list by value (1D) or by index/axis (2D).

value.description: For 1D remove, remove first matching value.

index.description: For 2D remove, index to remove along axis.

axis.description: For 2D remove: axis=0 row, axis=1 column.

name: insert
description: Insert into list at index (1D) or along axis (2D).

value.description: Value or row list to insert.

axis.description: Optional for 2D insert: axis=0 row insert, axis=1 column insert.

name: sort
description: Sort list (1D) or sort rows/elements in 2D based on axis.

axis.description: Optional for 2D sort: axis=0 sort each column independently (NumPy-like), axis=1 sort each row.

name: reverse
description: Reverse list (1D) or reverse rows/elements in 2D based on axis.

axis.description: Optional for 2D reverse: axis=0 flip along rows (reverse row order), axis=1 flip within each row.
